parameters.content: wf_tenant_policy_upsert writes a tenant route policy to /tenants/policy so stricter tenant enforcement can be staged per route without editing code.

parameters.jsCode: return [{json:{tenant_id:'default', route_prefix:'/secrets/', resource_type:'secrets', strict_mode:'enforce', require_membership:true, allow_admin_override:false, allow_service_account_override:false, metadata_json:{owner:'security', note:'Keep secrets tenant-bound by default'}}}];

const body = $json.body || $json; const policy = body.policy || {}; return [{json:{status: body.status || 'ok', tenant_id: policy.tenant_id || 'default', route_prefix: policy.route_prefix, resource_type: policy.resource_type, strict_mode: policy.strict_mode, allow_admin_override: !!policy.allow_admin_override, require_membership: !!policy.require_membership, metadata_json: policy.metadata_json || {}}}];
